'''鈭歭-th-zh-n''' ('''kalathzhenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:brainchild|brainchild]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-th-zh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:brainchild|brainchild]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-th-zh-n
|-
! Lemma
| kalathzhenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilathzhenoko|thilathzhenoko]] || [[word:jilathzhenoko|jilathzhenoko]] || [[word:shilathzhenoko|shilathzhenoko]] || [[word:kilathzhenoko|kilathzhenoko]]
